label: Chemical
Dataset
Structure
description: Dataset describing the chemical identity and three-dimensional structure of molecules, oligomers, polymers, or condensed-phase systems. It may include SMILES strings, atomistic coordinates, bonding topology, periodic boundary conditions, and molecular connectivity. The dataset is used as input for structure generation, force-field assignment, molecular dynamics simulations, and construction of bulk models.
format: SMILES, MOL, SDF, PDB, XYZ, GRO, CIF
